recommendations.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
recommendations.overview: The starship Enterprise and its crew is pulled back into action when old nemesis, Khan, steals a top secret device called Project Genesis.

recommendations.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
recommendations.overview: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

recommendations.title: Time After Time
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Drama, Comedy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Writer H. G. Wells pursues Jack the Ripper to modern day San Francisco after the infamous serial killer steals his time machine to escape the 19th century.

recommendations.title: Volunteers
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Yale in 1962, womanizing Lawrence flees a gambling debt that his rich dad won't pay and takes his roomie's place as a Peace Corps Volunteer in the Thai Golden Triangle with two other PCVs. Will he survive two years?

recommendations.title: Two Thousand Maniacs!
recommendations.overview: Six people are lured into a small Deep South town for a Centennial celebration where the residents kill them one by one as revenge for the town's destruction during the Civil War.

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.

recommendations.title: For the Love of Spock
recommendations.overview: The life of Mr. Spock, as well as that of Leonard Nimoy, the actor who played him for almost fifty years, written and directed by his son: Adam.

recommendations.title: Requiem for a Dream
recommendations.overview: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island residents are shattered when their addictions run deep.

recommendations.title: The Returned
recommendations.overview: The lives of the residents of a small French town are changed when thousands of the recently dead inexplicably come back to life and try to integrate themselves into society that has changed for them.

recommendations.title: The Mist
recommendations.overview: After a violent storm, a dense cloud of mist envelops a small Maine town, trapping David Drayton and his five-year-old son in a local grocery store with other local residents. They soon discover that the mist conceals deadly horrors that threaten the
